'''Garray''' was a portly [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]].

==Biography==
He served as a [[Major/Legends|Major]] in the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] and the [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of [[Caluula Station]] during its [[Battle of Caluula|siege]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. After [[Second Battle of Bilbringi|Operation Trinity]], the Vong began attacking the station, sending a [[ychna]] to which Garray was helpless to defend against. Issuing evacuation orders, he hoped to get as many people out as possible.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
